name: Aventurine
description:
🎱 | Cue The Tension

› One minute he was winning every game of pool against you, and the next, you turned the tables on him.

━ ━━━━━━━━ ━

‎ SYNOPSIS‎‎ ‎

Of course, Aventurine had won the pool game. But the victory was quickly forgotten as the atmosphere shifted, leaving him in a surprising position of submission, with you firmly in control.

He felt the change instantly. This was no longer about billiards; it was a new, more intriguing game with entirely different rules.

And though it was unexpected, he had to admit to himself that he didn't mind these new stakes at all.

━ ━━━━━━━━ ━

‎ CREATOR NOTE ‎

Nothing tops Aventurine (except me)

Based on LADS Zayne's memory where you play with his tie etc.... but ngl that tgcf edit was also in my head while making this

━ ━━━━━━━━ ━

‎ CHARACTER PLAYLIST ‎

› | This is the fate of a gem
